title: ‘A disease you get when you care for someone’: WHO on the Ebola frontline
content:
Two weeks into the latest deadly Ebola outbreak, the World Health Organization (WHO) estimates there are now 906 suspected cases of Ebola in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC), including 223 suspected deaths. Read Full Story on UN News

The post ‘A disease you get when you care for someone’: WHO on the Ebola frontline appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: WHO chief calls for ceasefire amid DR Congo Ebola outbreak
content:
The Director-General of the World Health Organization (WHO) headed to the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) on Thursday as the country continues to combat a deadly resurgence of Ebola in its volatile eastern region where instability is rife.  Read Full Story on UN News

The post WHO chief calls for ceasefire amid DR Congo Ebola outbreak appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: Ebola outbreak in DR Congo collides with conflict and hunger, WHO warns
content:
The UN World Health Organization (WHO) on Wednesday warned that eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo faces a “catastrophic collision of disease and conflict” as a fast-spreading Ebola outbreak outpaces containment efforts in a region already battered by armed violence, mass displacement and acute hunger. Read Full Story on UN News

The post Ebola outbreak in DR Congo collides with conflict and hunger, WHO warns appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: International airlines urged to stick to safety measures in wake of Ebola outbreak
content:
As a deadly Ebola strain continues to spread in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), with cases confirmed in neighbouring Uganda, the UN aviation agency is urging governments and flight operators to closely follow guidelines put in place following the COVID-19 pandemic. Read Full Story on UN News

The post International airlines urged to stick to safety measures in wake of Ebola outbreak appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: Ebola epidemic spreading rapidly and outpacing containment efforts
content:
There are more than 900 suspected cases of the Bundibugyo strain of Ebola in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, and 220 suspected deaths, the head of the World Health Organization (WHO), Tedros Ghebreyesus, said on Monday. Read Full Story on UN News

The post Ebola epidemic spreading rapidly and outpacing containment efforts appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: Ebola risk ‘very high’ in eastern DR Congo as UN intensifies response
content:
The UN is rushing emergency personnel, funding and supplies into eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) to counter the fast-growing Ebola outbreak spreading through conflict-ravaged provinces. Read Full Story on UN News

The post Ebola risk ‘very high’ in eastern DR Congo as UN intensifies response appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.
snippet: The UN is rushing emergency personnel, funding and supplies into eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) to counter the fast-growing Ebola outbreak spreading through conflict-ravaged provinces.

title: UN agencies step up Ebola response in eastern DR Congo
content:
United Nations agencies have moved swiftly to support efforts to contain the latest Ebola outbreak in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), delivering emergency medical supplies, protective equipment and logistics support. Read Full Story on UN News

The post UN agencies step up Ebola response in eastern DR Congo appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: Ebola outbreak: ‘Every epidemic begins in a community and ends in a community’
content:
Facing a fast-moving Ebola outbreak caused by a rare strain of the virus, the World Health Organization (WHO) is relying on a rapid, community-centred response to halt transmission in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) and Uganda, a senior official has told UN News. Read Full Story on UN News

The post Ebola outbreak: ‘Every epidemic begins in a community and ends in a community’ appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: Press Release | Multistakeholder Advisory Group Renewed and MAG Chair Appointed to Prepare the XXI Internet Governance Forum Meeting in 2026
content:
MULTISTAKEHOLDER ADVISORY GROUP RENEWED AND MAG CHAIR APPOINTED TO PREPARE THE XXI INTERNET GOVERNANCE FORUM MEETING IN 2026 The membership of the Multistakeholder Advisory Group of the 2026 Internet Governance Forum (IGF) has been renewed. A total of 40 members, 18 of whom are new, have been appointed. The Advisory Group members are drawn from [...]

title: Ebola outbreak follows hunger and displacement crisis in DR Congo
content:
A day after the World Health Organization (WHO) declared the new Ebola outbreak in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo an international emergency, top global disease transmission experts stressed that the chances of another global pandemic similar to the 2019 coronavirus emergency are increasing all the time. Read Full Story on UN News

The post Ebola outbreak follows hunger and displacement crisis in DR Congo appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.
